tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"fortigate-firewall","command":"config firewall address
    edit "UbuntuComputer_192.168.1.3"
        set subnet 192.168.1.3 255.255.255.255
    next
end"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
config firewall address

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (address) #     edit "UbuntuComputer_192.168.1.3"
new entry 'UbuntuComputer_192.168.1.3' added

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (UbuntuComputer_1~1.3) #         set subnet 192.168.1.3 255.2 55.255.255

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (UbuntuComputer_1~1.3) #     next

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (address) # end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
show firewall policy
config firewall policy
    edit 100
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-NAT"
        set uuid 868edb74-2aaa-51f1-7993-02c265357be3
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set nat enable
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"fortigate-firewall","command":"config firewall service custom
    edit "DNS_TCP_UDP_53"
        set tcp-portrange 53
        set udp-portrange 53
    next
end"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
config firewall service custom

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (custom) #     edit "DNS_TCP_UDP_53"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (DNS_TCP_UDP_53) #         set tcp-portrange 53

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (DNS_TCP_UDP_53) #         set udp-portrange 53

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (DNS_TCP_UDP_53) #     next

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (custom) # end

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"fortigate-firewall","command":"config firewall policy
    edit 0
        set name "Block-UbuntuComputer-DNS-Exfil"
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action deny
        set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer_192.168.1.3"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "DNS_TCP_UDP_53"
    next
end"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
show firewall policy
config firewall policy
    edit 100
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-NAT"
        set uuid 868edb74-2aaa-51f1-7993-02c265357be3
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set nat enable
    next
    edit 2
        set name "Block-UbuntuComputer-DNS-Exfil"
        set uuid e310154a-32af-51f1-0888-3892da21c64a
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer_192.168.1.3"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "DNS_TCP_UDP_53"
        set logtraffic disable
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
show firewall policy
config firewall policy
    edit 2
        set name "Block-UbuntuComputer-DNS-Exfil"
        set uuid e310154a-32af-51f1-0888-3892da21c64a
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer_192.168.1.3"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "DNS_TCP_UDP_53"
        set logtraffic disable
    next
    edit 100
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-NAT"
        set uuid 868edb74-2aaa-51f1-7993-02c265357be3
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set nat enable
    next
end
